title: Brathydium rugelianum
taxonomy: Brathydium rugelianum belongs to the kingdom Animalia, and more specifically, it falls under the phylum Mollusca, as it is a type of fossilized brachiopod. Brathydium rugelianum is classified within the class Rhynchonellata, which is a group of extinct marine brachiopods. It is further classified under the order Rhynchonellida. This classification places Brathydium rugelianum within the class of brachiopods that have a distinctive rhynchonellid shell morphology. The exact family and genus classification may require further research.
